title: RebindNarrator
body:
This mod unlocks the ability to change the keybind to enable the narrator. In vanilla, you are hard locked into leaving CTRL + B to the narrator, but NO LONGER. This mod hooks into the vanilla code and gives you the ability to change or completely remove the narrator keybind!

 

__Issues and Feature Requests__

For issues and feature requests PLEASE use the GitHub issues page [here](https://github.com/Ocraftyone/rebindnarrator/issues). It is MUCH easier to keep up with than comments. I will still do my best to keep up with comments and respond, but you may be asked to create an issue.
